$comment: Claude Code hooks for plugin/marketplace validation. Add to .claude/settings.json

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; FORBIDDEN="skills|agents|workflows|commands|hooks|stack|memory|generated"; if grep -qE "\"($FORBIDDEN)\":" "$FILE"; then echo "@@HOOK_FAILED@@"; echo "plugin.json contains FORBIDDEN fields that cause install failure."; echo ""; echo "FIX: Remove these fields from plugin.json:"; grep -oE "\"($FORBIDDEN)\"" "$FILE" | sort -u; echo ""; echo "These are auto-discovered by Claude Code - do not include them."; exit 1; fi; if jq -e ".author | type == \"string\"" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "@@HOOK_FAILED@@"; echo "plugin.json has wrong author format."; echo ""; echo "FIX: Change author from string to object:"; echo "  WRONG: \"author\": \"name\""; echo "  RIGHT: \"author\": {\"name\": \"name\"}"; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ plugin.json valid"'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if ! jq -e ".name" "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "@@HOOK_FAILED@@"; echo "marketplace.json missing required field: name"; echo ""; echo "FIX: Add name field:"; echo "  {\"name\": \"my-marketplace\", ...}"; exit 1; fi; if ! jq -e ".plugins" "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "@@HOOK_FAILED@@"; echo "marketplace.json missing required field: plugins"; echo ""; echo "FIX: Add plugins array:"; echo "  {\"plugins\": [{\"name\": \"...\", \"source\": \"./...\"}]}"; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ marketplace.json valid"'
